channel.title: Aes-Cbc on bBG — CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Aes-Cbc on bBG — CTF Writeups

item.title: Blocky OX — CBC Decryption Oracle as Encryption Oracle
item.description: Turn an AES-CBC decryption oracle into an encryption oracle by exploiting the block-independent nature of CBC decryption.

item.title: Cry3 — AES-CBC Bit-Flip on Token Parser
item.description: Exploit AES-CBC’s malleability to flip index bytes in a server-parsed token and recover flag chunks.
